# CWE-412 negative: server-fixed lock path (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-412-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"sync"
)

const fixedJobLock = "/var/run/slopguard/job.lock"

var jobGate sync.Mutex

func HandleAcquireLock(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = r
	data, err := os.ReadFile(fixedJobLock)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "lock read failed", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	if string(data) != "free" {
		http.Error(w, "busy", http.StatusConflict)
		return
	}
	jobGate.Lock()
	_ = os.WriteFile(fixedJobLock, []byte("held"), 0o600)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
